name: accessibility-lens
description: Accessibility Lens: scan any public web page and experience it through four disability profiles, with AI-assisted fixes.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace client && npm run build --workspace server
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace server && npm run test --workspace client
scripts.coverage: npm run coverage --workspace server && npm run coverage --workspace client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace server && npm run lint --workspace client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace server && npm run typecheck --workspace client
